# format: html5-token-v1
# note: input.html intentionally ends with a trailing newline byte
START name=html attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=head attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=title attrs=[] self_closing=false
CHAR text="Tom & Jerry <b>"
END name=title
END name=head
START name=body attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=section attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=textarea attrs=[] self_closing=false
CHAR text="A&B<x>"
END name=textarea
START name=p attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=em attrs=[] self_closing=false
CHAR text="ok"
END name=em
END name=p
END name=section
END name=body
END name=html
CHAR text="\n"
EOF
